name: Tonight
detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before midnight, then patchy fog and a chance of showers and thunderstorms between midnight and 5am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 57. Southeast wind 2 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
